options.name: --template
options.description: Specify a template for the created project (a custom template on npm (search for "cra-template-*"), a relative path, or an archive (.tgz or .tar.gz))

options.name: --use-npm
options.description: Use npm to install dependencies (default when Yarn is not installed)

options.name: --use-pnp
options.description: Use Yarn Plug'n'Play to create the app

options.name: --scripts-version
options.description: Use a non-standard version of react-scripts (a specific npm version or npm tag, a custom fork published on npm, a relative path, or an archive (.tgz or .tar.gz))
